fase01-o-caos-das-strings/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
fase01-o-caos-das-strings/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language rules and bytecode version, failing to utilize Java 21 features or producing incompatible bytecode for a Java 21 runtime environment.

fase01-o-caos-das-strings/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API for accessing the first element of a list.
